creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #3)
> Either the PR gets merged and a new release is made or the PR stalls

The merge-requests aren't changing. If there is a new release, the download remains valid -- until the port is upgraded for the new release, which time the patch can be removed. Not any more "temporal", than all other downloadable patches.

> So having this ugliness is fine IMO.

Sigh...
